description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, build and release, using the default image registry.gitlab.com/alelec/docker-android. In the build stage, add a job named build that sets GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to normal, runs `bash ./build_from_ci.sh`, then `mv ./dist/*.zip ./`, then `ls *.zip`, and stores any `navdy-display-alelec-*.zip` files as artifacts that expire after one week. The build job uses the default Docker image and has no additional services or caches. In the release stage, add a job named release that uses the python:3 image, runs only for tag pipelines, sets GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to none, installs the gitlab_release tool with `pip3 install gitlab_release`, and executes `python3 -m gitlab_release --link-artifact ./navdy-display-alelec-*.zip` to create a GitLab Release linking the artifact. The release job also uploads the same zip files as artifacts.
